name: two-sum
title: Two Sum
legend: Given an array of integers and a target value, find two distinct indices whose elements sum to the target.
input: First line: n and target. Second line: n integers.
output: Two 1-indexed indices i j such that a_i + a_j = target, or -1 -1 if none.
solution_idea: Hash map: for each element a_i check if target - a_i is already in the map.
